Bash(cat > /tmp/gen.py << 'PYEOF'
lines = []
lines.append\('use base64::{engine::general_purpose::STANDARD, Engine};'\)
lines.append\('use reqwest::Client;'\)
lines.append\('use serde_json::{json, Value};'\)
lines.append\('use std::sync::Arc;'\)
lines.append\('use tokio::sync::RwLock;'\)
lines.append\('use tokio::time::{sleep, Duration};'\)
lines.append\('use tracing::info;'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('use crate::ai::error::AIError;'\)
lines.append\('use crate::ai::{AIProvider, GenerateRequest, ProviderRuntimeConfig};'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('const DEFAULT_BASE_URL: &str = "http://aiinone.seasungame.com:8000";'\)
lines.append\('const POLL_INTERVAL_MS: u64 = 3000;'\)
lines.append\('const MAX_POLL_ATTEMPTS: u32 = 120;'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('fn encode_image\(source: &str\) -> Option<String> {'\)
lines.append\('    let trimmed = source.trim\(\);'\)
lines.append\('    if trimmed.starts_with\("data:"\) {'\)
lines.append\('        return trimmed.split\(","\).nth\(1\).map\(|s| s.to_string\(\)\);'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('    let raw = trimmed.trim_start_matches\("file://"\);'\)
lines.append\('    let decoded = urlencoding::decode\(raw\)'\)
lines.append\('        .map\(|r| r.into_owned\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('        .unwrap_or_else\(|_| raw.to_string\(\)\);'\)
lines.append\('    let path = if decoded.starts_with\("/"\) && decoded.len\(\) > 2 && decoded.as_bytes\(\).get\(2\) == Some\(&58u8\) {'\)
lines.append\('        decoded[1..].to_string\(\)'\)
lines.append\('    } else { decoded };'\)
lines.append\('    std::fs::read\(&path\).ok\(\).map\(|b| STANDARD.encode\(&b\)\)'\)
lines.append\('}'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('pub struct TcNanoBanaProvider {'\)
lines.append\('    client: Client,'\)
lines.append\('    api_key: Arc<RwLock<Option<String>>>,'\)
lines.append\('    base_url: Arc<RwLock<String>>,'\)
lines.append\('}'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('impl TcNanoBanaProvider {'\)
lines.append\('    pub fn new\(\) -> Self {'\)
lines.append\('        Self {'\)
lines.append\('            client: Client::new\(\),'\)
lines.append\('            api_key: Arc::new\(RwLock::new\(None\)\),'\)
lines.append\('            base_url: Arc::new\(RwLock::new\(DEFAULT_BASE_URL.to_string\(\)\)\),'\)
lines.append\('        }'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('}'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('#[async_trait::async_trait]'\)
lines.append\('impl AIProvider for TcNanoBanaProvider {'\)
lines.append\('    fn name\(&self\) -> &str { "tcnanobana" }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('    fn supports_model\(&self, model: &str\) -> bool {'\)
lines.append\('        model.starts_with\("tcnanobana/"\)'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('    async fn set_api_key\(&self, api_key: String\) -> Result<\(\), AIError> {'\)
lines.append\('        let mut key = self.api_key.write\(\).await;'\)
lines.append\('        *key = if api_key.trim\(\).is_empty\(\) { None } else { Some\(api_key.trim\(\).to_string\(\)\) };'\)
lines.append\('        Ok\(\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('    async fn configure_runtime\(&self, config: ProviderRuntimeConfig\) -> Result<\(\), AIError> {'\)
lines.append\('        self.set_api_key\(config.api_key\).await?;'\)
lines.append\('        if !config.base_url.trim\(\).is_empty\(\) {'\)
lines.append\('            let mut url = self.base_url.write\(\).await;'\)
lines.append\('            *url = config.base_url.trim\(\).trim_end_matches\("/"\).to_string\(\);'\)
lines.append\('        }'\)
lines.append\('        Ok\(\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('    async fn generate\(&self, request: GenerateRequest\) -> Result<String, AIError> {'\)
lines.append\('        let api_key: String = match request.runtime_config.as_ref\(\) {'\)
lines.append\('            Some\(rc\) if !rc.api_key.trim\(\).is_empty\(\) => rc.api_key.trim\(\).to_string\(\),'\)
lines.append\('            _ => self.api_key.read\(\).await.clone\(\)'\)
lines.append\('                .ok_or_else\(|| AIError::InvalidRequest\("TC Nano Banana API key not set".to_string\(\)\)\)?,'\)
lines.append\('        };'\)
lines.append\('        let base_url = match request.runtime_config.as_ref\(\) {'\)
lines.append\('            Some\(rc\) if !rc.base_url.trim\(\).is_empty\(\) => rc.base_url.trim\(\).trim_end_matches\("/"\).to_string\(\),'\)
lines.append\('            _ => self.base_url.read\(\).await.clone\(\),'\)
lines.append\('        };'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        let mut parts: Vec<Value> = vec![json!\({"text": request.prompt}\)];'\)
lines.append\('        if let Some\(ref images\) = request.reference_images {'\)
lines.append\('            for src in images {'\)
lines.append\('                if let Some\(b64\) = encode_image\(src\) {'\)
lines.append\('                    parts.push\(json!\({"inlineData": {"mimeType": "image/png", "data": b64}}\)\);'\)
lines.append\('                }'\)
lines.append\('            }'\)
lines.append\('        }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        let body = json!\({'\)
lines.append\('            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash-image-preview",'\)
lines.append\('            "data": {'\)
lines.append\('                "contents": [{"role": "user", "parts": parts}],'\)
lines.append\('                "generationConfig": {'\)
lines.append\('                    "responseModalities": ["TEXT", "IMAGE"],'\)
lines.append\('                    "temperature": 0.8,'\)
lines.append\('                    "maxOutputTokens": 8192,'\)
lines.append\('                    "aspect_ratio": request.aspect_ratio,'\)
lines.append\('                    "resolution": request.size,'\)
lines.append\('                }'\)
lines.append\('            }'\)
lines.append\('        }\);'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        let create_url = format!\("{}/ai_in_one/v2/createImage", base_url\);'\)
lines.append\('        info!\("[TCNanoBanana] POST {}", create_url\);'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        let resp = self.client.post\(&create_url\)'\)
lines.append\('            .header\("Authorization", format!\("Bearer {}", api_key\)\)'\)
lines.append\('            .header\("Content-Type", "application/json"\)'\)
lines.append\('            .json\(&body\).send\(\).await?;'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        if !resp.status\(\).is_success\(\) {'\)
lines.append\('            let s = resp.status\(\); let t = resp.text\(\).await.unwrap_or_default\(\);'\)
lines.append\('            return Err\(AIError::Provider\(format!\("TCNanoBanana create failed {}: {}", s, t\)\)\);'\)
lines.append\('        }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        let rj: Value = resp.json\(\).await?;'\)
lines.append\('        let task_id = rj["data"]["id"].as_str\(\)'\)
lines.append\('            .ok_or_else\(|| AIError::Provider\("TCNanoBanana: missing task id".to_string\(\)\)\)?'\)
lines.append\('            .to_string\(\);'\)
lines.append\('        info!\("[TCNanoBanana] task_id={}", task_id\);'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('        let query_url = format!\("{}/ai_in_one/v2/queryImage", base_url\);'\)
lines.append\('        for attempt in 0..MAX_POLL_ATTEMPTS {'\)
lines.append\('            sleep\(Duration::from_millis\(POLL_INTERVAL_MS\)\).await;'\)
lines.append\('            let pr = self.client.post\(&query_url\)'\)
lines.append\('                .header\("Authorization", format!\("Bearer {}", api_key\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                .header\("Content-Type", "application/json"\)'\)
lines.append\('                .json\(&json!\({"id": task_id}\)\).send\(\).await?;'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('            if !pr.status\(\).is_success\(\) {'\)
lines.append\('                let s = pr.status\(\); let t = pr.text\(\).await.unwrap_or_default\(\);'\)
lines.append\('                return Err\(AIError::Provider\(format!\("TCNanoBanana poll failed {}: {}", s, t\)\)\);'\)
lines.append\('            }'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('            let pj: Value = pr.json\(\).await?;'\)
lines.append\('            let status = pj["data"]["status"].as_str\(\).unwrap_or\("unknown"\);'\)
lines.append\('            info!\("[TCNanoBanana] poll {}/{} status={}", attempt + 1, MAX_POLL_ATTEMPTS, status\);'\)
lines.append\(''\)
lines.append\('            match status {'\)
lines.append\('                "SUCCESS" | "success" | "completed" => {'\)
lines.append\('                    if let Some\(b64\) = pj["data"]["candidates"].as_array\(\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|a| a.first\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|c| c["content"]["parts"].as_array\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|ps| ps.iter\(\).find\(|p| p["inlineData"].is_object\(\)\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|p| p["inlineData"]["data"].as_str\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                    {'\)
lines.append\('                        return Ok\(format!\("data:image/png;base64,{}", b64\)\);'\)
lines.append\('                    }'\)
lines.append\('                    if let Some\(uri\) = pj["data"]["candidates"].as_array\(\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|a| a.first\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|c| c["content"]["parts"].as_array\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|ps| ps.iter\(\).find\(|p| p["fileData"].is_object\(\)\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                        .and_then\(|p| p["fileData"]["fileUri"].as_str\(\)\)'\)
lines.append\('                    {'\)
lines.append\('                        return Ok\(uri.to_string\(\)\);'\)
lines.append\('                    }'\)
lines.append\('                    return Err\(AIError::Provider\("TCNanoBanana: no image in result".to_string\(\)\)\);'\)
lines.append\('                }'\)
lines.append\('                "FAILED" | "failed" | "error" => {'\)
lines.append\('                    let msg = pj["data"]["error"].as_str\(\).unwrap_or\("unknown"\);'\)
lines.append\('                    return Err\(AIError::Provider\(format!\("TCNanoBanana task failed: {}", msg\)\)\);'\)
lines.append\('                }'\)
lines.append\('                _ => {}'\)
lines.append\('            }'\)
lines.append\('        }'\)
lines.append\('        Err\(AIError::Provider\(format!\("TCNanoBanana task {} timed out", task_id\)\)\)'\)
lines.append\('    }'\)
lines.append\('}'\)

with open\('/f/StoryBox-main/src-tauri/src/ai/providers/tcnanobana/mod.rs', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\('\\n'.join\(lines\) + '\\n'\)
print\('written', len\(lines\), 'lines'\)
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/gen.py)
